visual_description: The man in a grey suit and turtleneck stands in a dimly lit alley with his arms outstretched, facing two other men — one in a patterned shirt smoking and holding a bottle, the other in a dark shirt. He holds a water bottle, steps forward, and takes a drink while the others watch. A bright neon sign with Chinese characters hangs in the background.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible, with indistinct ambient sounds.
